$comment: Source: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/sub-agents#supported-frontmatter-fields — Check this page periodically for new fields.
title: Agent Frontmatter Schema
description: Schema for Claude Code agent (.claude/agents/*.md) YAML frontmatter fields

name.description: Unique identifier using lowercase letters and hyphens

description.description: When Claude should delegate to this subagent

tools.description: Tools the subagent can use. Inherits all tools if omitted. Comma-separated string or array.

disallowedTools.description: Tools to deny, removed from inherited or specified list

model.description: Model to use: 'sonnet', 'opus', 'haiku', a full model ID (e.g. claude-opus-4-6), or 'inherit'. Defaults to 'inherit'.

maxTurns.description: Maximum number of agentic turns before the subagent stops

skills.description: Skills to preload into the subagent's context at startup. Full content is injected, not just made available.

mcpServers.description: MCP servers available to this subagent. Each entry is either an inline server definition (object with server name key) or a string referencing an already-configured server.

hooks.description: Lifecycle hooks scoped to this subagent. Supports PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop events.

memory.description: Persistent memory scope. Enables cross-session learning.

background.description: Set to true to always run this subagent as a background task. Default: false.

effort.description: Effort level when this subagent is active. Overrides session effort level.

isolation.description: Set to 'worktree' to run in a temporary git worktree for an isolated copy of the repository.

initialPrompt.description: Auto-submitted as the first user turn when this agent runs as the main session agent (via --agent or the agent setting).

color.description: Background color for the subagent in the UI.
